lines: The United States play Bosnia‑Herzegovina on Wednesday at 8 p.m. ET.
The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 6‑5 yesterday, moving to 34‑47 on the season.
The Indians travel to face the Omaha Storm Chasers tomorrow night at 8:05 p.m. ET.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Monday, June 29. The United States play Bosnia‑Herzegovina on Wednesday at 8 p.m. ET. The Indianapolis Indians edged the Scranton/Wilkes‑Barre RailRiders 6‑5 yesterday, moving to 34‑47 on the season. The Indians travel to face the Omaha Storm Chasers tomorrow night at 8:05 p.m. ET. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
